completion_hooks.name: docs-writer-completion
completion_hooks.description: Invoke docs-writer before ending work when any files in the project related to documentation or Kotlin code are changed, to ensure documentation is updated accordingly.

completion_hooks.name: build-health-completion
completion_hooks.description: Run the project-defined highest-signal Gradle validation task before ending work.

completion_hooks.name: run-tests-completion
completion_hooks.description: Run the full test task for the project before ending work.
